description: Alex Government Chief of Staff — orchestrates cross-suite workflows, manages inter-department handoffs, tracks SLA compliance, and provides jurisdiction-wide analytics

hard_stops.label: Cross-Suite Data Sharing Without Authorization
hard_stops.logic: A worker in one suite is attempting to access data from another suite without the required inter-departmental data sharing agreement on file

hard_stops.label: SLA Breach — Critical Process
hard_stops.logic: A critical government process (title issuance, permit decision, recording) has exceeded its statutory or SLA deadline — immediate escalation required

hard_stops.label: Audit Trail Gap
hard_stops.logic: A gap has been detected in the audit trail for a government transaction — all government actions must have complete, immutable audit records

soft_flags.label: Approaching SLA Warning Threshold
soft_flags.logic: One or more processes are within 20% of their SLA deadline — proactive attention needed to avoid breach

soft_flags.label: Worker Utilization Imbalance
soft_flags.logic: One suite has more than 3x the pending task volume of another suite — consider rebalancing workload or adding capacity
